settings.title: Four Business Expenses People Forget to Claim
settings.excerpt: Small deductions add up over a year, and these are the ones we most often have to remind clients about.
settings.body:
Every January we review returns and find the same legitimate expenses left off. None of them are exotic. They are simply easy to overlook in a busy year.

  • A portion of home utility costs when you work from home
  • Professional subscriptions and trade memberships
  • Mileage for business journeys in your own car
  • Bank charges and interest on business accounts

Keep a simple record as you go and these become effortless to claim. The hard version is trying to reconstruct a whole year from memory in the final week.

If you are unsure whether something qualifies, ask before you file rather than after.
